articles.headline: 2026 World Cup: Which 48 teams qualified for the tournament?
articles.description: The race to qualify for the 2026 FIFA World Cup is complete. Here's how it all went down across the globe.

images.credit: Linnea Rheborg - UEFA/UEFA via Getty Images

images.name: Scotland celebrate [1296x729]
images.credit: Alan Harvey/SNS Group via Getty Images

images.name: Marcotti: Italy have 'no excuses' for another World Cup failure
images.caption: Gab Marcotti reacts to Italy failing to qualify for a third straight World Cup after losing to Bosnia and Herzegovina on penalties.

articles.headline: Could Morocco beat Brazil in Group C at the World Cup?

article.headline: Messi nets hat trick as Argentina steamroll Bolivia
article.description: Lionel Messi scored a hat-trick and had a hand in two more goals as Argentina crushed Bolivia 6-0 in South American qualifiers for the 2026 World Cup on Tuesday.
article.linkText: Messi nets hat trick as Argentina steamroll Bolivia

images.name: How Messi made more history for Argentina
images.caption: Check out Lionel Messi's latest show for Argentina in their 6-0 thrashing of Bolivia in World Cup qualifying.

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Analysis (How Messi made more history for Argentina) 2024/10/15 T2V

article.story:
Lionel Messi scored a hat trick and had a hand in two more goals as Argentina crushed Bolivia 6-0 in South American qualifiers for the 2026 World Cup on Tuesday in front of raucous fans at the Monumental de Nuñez Stadium.

It marked the first time in Messi's international career that he had multiple goals and assists in a single game, and the hat trick was his 10th for Argentina -- tying Cristiano Ronaldo's mark for hat tricks with Portugal.

Making only his second international appearance since recovering from an injury sustained at the Copa América in July, Messi capitalised on a mistake by defender Marcelo Suarez to open the scoring in the 19th minute.

"We enjoyed this, we are happy to be here playing in Argentina," said Messi, who once again refused to say whether he will play in the next World Cup in 2026. "This could be one of the last [matches in front of the Argentinian crowd]."

Bolivia goalkeeper Guillermo Viscarra made a couple of fine saves to prevent the hosts from extending their lead but he was beaten in the 43rd minute when Lautaro Martinez scored from Messi's quick cross.

Argentina made it 3-0 just before the break, Messi setting up Julián Álvarez to score.

Argentina controlled the second half and substitute Thiago Almada added a fourth from Nahuel Molina's pass in the 70th minute before Messi scored twice late on to cap a terrific performance.

Copa América winners Argentina top the standings on 22 points, three clear of Colombia, who beat Chile earlier in the day.

Bolivia, looking to qualify for the World Cup for the first time in 30 years, remain in contention with 12 points.

The 2026 World Cup will be hosted by the United States, Mexico and Canada.

videos.headline: Will Messi still be playing for Argentina at the 2026 World Cup?
videos.description: Mauricio Pedroza reacts to Lionel Messi's comments about his teammates after Argentina's 6-0 win over Bolivia.

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Analysis (Will Messi still be playing for Argentina at the 2026 World Cup?) 2024/10/16 GLOBAL

keyEvents.text: Goal! Argentina 1, Bolivia 0. Lionel Messi (Argentina) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Lautaro Martínez.
Goal! Argentina 2, Bolivia 0. Lautaro Martínez (Argentina) right footed shot from the left side of the six yard box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Lionel Messi following a fast break.
Goal! Argentina 3, Bolivia 0. Julián Alvarez (Argentina) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Lionel Messi following a set piece situation.

Substitution, Bolivia. Luis Paz replaces Roberto Fernández.
